THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUINTO, FERNANDO $3,251.72 PRINCIPAL, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,497.72, SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-18-24 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-18-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) (COURTESY COPIES). UPON COMPLIANCE, MOTION MAY BE RE-SET FOR A MON.-THUR. AFTER NOVEMBER 27. PAPERS SHALL BEAR NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant FERNANDO GUINTO (Tel: 415-756-3358) present in pro per;
Also present: ANREW GUINTO, Fernando Guinto's son;
No appearance made by/for the plaintiff.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Set Aside Judgment.

The Court explains to the defendant the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Upon compliance, motion may be re-set for a Mon.-Thur. after November 27. Papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
